mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_link_access_stats (gid, full_short_url, date, hour, weekday, pv, uv, uip, create_time, update_time, del_flag) VALUES (#{gid}, #{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{hour}, #{weekday}, #{pv}, #{uv}, #{uip}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pv = pv + VALUES(pv), uv = uv + VALUES(uv), uip = uip + VALUES(uip), update_time = NOW()
